title: couple peel redraws one campus arch repair
prompt: Repair the world-redrawing idea into a physically provable transition styleframe. Preserve Liz and John, their faces, clothes, Peelerz products, warm campus light, and centered connection. Behind them is one recognizable ivy-covered stone campus arch. A broad translucent mango peel film begins visibly at the curled candy peel in Liz's raised hand and sweeps vertically across the arch. Stage the exact instant of conversion: on one side the arch is photographic stone and ivy; where the film intersects it, the same masonry is half-photographic and half-painted; on the far side the SAME arch has become a hand-painted fruit-tree gateway. Keep its silhouette and perspective continuous across all three states. The film must cross the foreground and cast a faint colored refraction, not form a portal circle. One object visibly being redrawn, one cause, no extra worlds, no candy explosion, no text, no watermark.
